About Organization

Railway Recruitment Board (RRB) is a government organization responsible for recruiting employees for the Indian Railways. The RRB is headed by a Chairman and has several members who are experts in their respective fields.
The RRB is responsible for conducting exams and selecting candidates for various posts in the Indian Railways.

About the Programme

The Railway RRB Junior Engineer CEN 04/2026 is a government job opportunity for Indian citizens. The programme is open for 4090 posts and candidates can apply online from 14/08/2026 to 13/09/2026.
The programme is designed to recruit junior engineers for the Indian Railways and candidates who are selected will be posted in various locations across India.
